if_interested.step_1: Write reply to new_replies.json immediately with full raw text
if_interested.step_2: Classify in reply_classifications.json as INTERESTED with full reasoning
if_interested.step_3: Cancel Day-14 send for this lead — replace with proposal flow
if_interested.step_4: Prepare bespoke proposal within 24h from reply time (24/7 — NON-NEGOTIABLE)
if_interested.step_5: Match proposal scope to lead signal. See value_delivery_queue.json (value_delivery_on_interested section). Give 3 options.
if_interested.step_8: Update CRM pipeline stage to proposal_sent

reply_handling.if_not_interested: Classify NOT_INTERESTED. Cancel Day-14 permanently. Suppress email channel. Log CHANGELOG.
reply_handling.if_unsubscribe: Classify UNSUBSCRIBE. Cancel Day-14. Suppress ALL channels within 24h (GDPR Article 21). Log audit_log and CHANGELOG.
reply_handling.if_ooo: Classify OUT_OF_OFFICE. Note return date. Pause Day-14. Send Day-14 on day after return if within window (return must be before 2026-05-25). 4-touchpoint limit applies.
reply_handling.if_wrong_person: Classify WRONG_PERSON. Investigate correct contact. Log CHANGELOG.
